news.t: GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs
GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs.

GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs: COYY, TSYY, NVYY, XBTY, AMYY, TQQY, AZYY, YSPY, MTYY, PLYY, HOYY, SMYY, BBYY, FBYY, IOYY, MAAY, NUGY, SEMY, QBY, RGYY, HMYY, RTYY, MUYY, TMYY, CWY, CRY and 20+ Others
GraniteShares Expands YieldBOOST™ Lineup with Two New ETFs Targeting RIOT Platforms and Hims & Hers Health (RTYY and HMYY)

overview.description: The GraniteShares YieldBoost RIOT ETF (RTYY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund is actively managed seeking current income and the daily 2x leverage of the price performance of Riot Platforms, Inc. (NASDAQ: RIOT) RTYY was launched on Dec 2, 2025 and is issued by GraniteShares.
